The '''Clone Scout Walker''' was a quadrupedal war [[Walker/Legends|walker]] used by [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. There was also a heavier version of the scout walker.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The [[LEGO]] company created an [[All Terrain Recon Transport/Legends|AT-RT]] LEGO set for the release of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. Although it bears the title of "Clone Scout Walker", it should not be confused with this walker.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
